Lei Tong йӣ·йҠ…
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lei Tong (йӣ·йҠ…). Officer of Liu Zhang and, later, Liu Bei. Killed by Zhang He at Baxi. Lei Tong was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Lei Tong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
